name: shadcn-svelte MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server providing access to shadcn-svelte — the Svelte port of shadcn/ui, a collection of reusable Tailwind CSS components. Enables AI coding agents to query shadcn-svelte component documentation, retrieve component code, discover available components, and support AI-assisted Svelte frontend development with shadcn components.
use_cases: Querying shadcn-svelte component documentation from Svelte coding agents
Retrieving component implementation code from frontend development agents
Discovering available shadcn-svelte components and their variants
Supporting AI-assisted Svelte/SvelteKit development with shadcn component access
not_for: React projects (use shadcn/ui directly — this is the Svelte port)
Teams using other UI frameworks without shadcn-svelte
best_when: A Svelte developer wants AI agents to quickly find and implement shadcn-svelte components — accessing component code and documentation during AI-assisted SvelteKit frontend development.
avoid_when: You use React with original shadcn/ui, or another frontend framework. Also: community tool, not official shadcn-svelte integration.

auth.notes: No authentication — queries public shadcn-svelte documentation.

known_agent_gotchas: shadcn-svelte is actively developed and components change — verify current API against shadcn-svelte docs
Community MCP (Michael-Obele) — not official shadcn-svelte integration
Component code may require Tailwind CSS and shadcn-svelte CLI setup in project
SvelteKit version compatibility — verify components work with your Svelte version
agent_readiness.security_notes: Read-only documentation queries. No credentials. Public component data. Low security risk.

security_score_components.security_notes: Read-only public data. No credentials. Low risk.
